title: lachemilla standleyi
intro: Lachemilla standleyi, also known as Chilean mountain rockrose, is a flowering plant species native to South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lachemilla standleyi include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce pain and inflammation, and aid in the treatment of various infections. Herbal preparations of Lachemilla standleyi can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne.
